About me

Marketing
that starts
with data

01

I build brands and strategies from the inside out — understanding people through data and translating that into growth.

Growth & BI professional with a background in Industrial & Systems Engineering (ITESM, graduating June 2026) and a specialization in Databases for Business Administration and Consumer Behavior at the University of Melbourne.

I've built full-funnel acquisition strategies, configured multi-channel contact workflows in CRM systems, and designed performance dashboards for healthcare, FMCG, and chemical companies. I combine quantitative rigor with creative instinct — from writing hooks and CTAs calibrated per funnel stage to modeling logistics networks.

Currently working in Growth & BI at Instituto Ingenes. Previously consulted for Coca-Cola FEMSA, Grupo Bimbo, and DOW Chemical. Bilingual — Spanish native, English C1 IELTS certified.

Featured experience

Where I built
the machine

03
Growth, Marketing Ops
& Business Intelligence Analyst
Instituto Ingenes — Fertilidad y Genética · Mexico City · Jul 2024 – Present
Full-time AnalystHubSpot CRM Multi-channel CampaignsFunnel Architecture Python AutomationOKR Tracking
Strategy & Architecture
  • Mapped the end-to-end lead journey across 6 business lines and 4 acquisition channels — from first touchpoint to commercial hand-off.
  • Identified pain points, hooks, and decision triggers for each audience segment to craft channel-specific messaging.
  • Designed lead magnets and CTAs calibrated to each funnel stage — awareness, consideration, and conversion.
  • Structured the conversion funnel with explicit MQL and SQL definitions, creating shared visibility between Marketing and the Contact Center.
  • Documented the full information flow architecture — from lead capture to CRM entry to Contact Center queue.
Content & Operations
  • Developed multi-channel workflow blueprints covering email, WhatsApp (MX), SMS (US & CA), and outbound calls — which IT then configured in HubSpot.
  • Co-created all workflow content with the team: subject lines, hooks, CTAs adapted for healthcare sensitivity.
  • Acted as the bridge between marketing strategy, IT configuration, and Contact Center execution.
  • Tracked business-wide KPIs and OKRs; built a Python + SQL automation that cut indicator processing time by 65%.

Projects that
moved numbers

04
No. 01
FeaturedSupply ChainLinear ProgrammingPython
Coca-Cola FEMSA — Distribution Network Redesign

Facility-location LP model to optimally allocate 10,780 daily pallets across 4 plants, 30 CEDIS, and 149 trucks. Python distance calculator + financial model projecting MXN $33.4M in annual savings — plus a reverse logistics PET reprocessing proposal.

DOW Chemical — Mexico Market Intelligence & Expansion Strategy

Synthesized data from ~180K social housing units. Built a market intelligence dashboard mapping 179K+ Infonavit contracts. Proposed Strategic Venture entry model (IRR ~10%, positive NPV) positioning DOW as a tech integrator.

No. 03
Lean Six SigmaOEEDMAIC
Grupo Bimbo (Tía Rosa) — Manufacturing OEE Optimization

Diagnosed 69% OEE on the Cuernitos 1 production line via Pareto and Ishikawa. Applied S&OP, Heijunka, Autonomous Maintenance, and Poka-Yoke targeting 85% OEE. 95% of stoppages came from demand misalignment.

69%→85%
OEE target

Lean tools
No. 04
Six SigmaANOVALogistic Regression
Segmail — Six Sigma Defect Reduction

Full DMAIC cycle — logistic regression, ANOVA, control charts — to isolate critical variables in a 13% defect process. Proposed redesign mitigating MXN $2.0M in non-quality costs.

13%→5%
